items.titolo: The Chatbot That Foretold Why People Share Secrets With ChatGPT
items.descrizione: In the 1960s an MIT professor named Joseph Weizenbaum created a chatbot called ELIZA. The conversations people had with it set precedents for the chatbots to come.

items.titolo: Windows questions? How Copilot can analyze your PC settings now
items.descrizione: Now rolling out to the Copilot Windows app, the new PC Insights skill can answer questions about your Windows system, settings, and more.

items.titolo: Anthropic says it can read Claude's 'thoughts,' as detailed in new research paper — models observed to have a global workspace, revealing more of what makes LLMs tick
items.descrizione: Anthropic has discovered an internal "J-space" for its Claude AI that displays similarities to human internal processing. While the AI developer anthropomorphizes it as thought, it may yet prove useful as a method of imp
